creator: stsp@stsp.in-berlin.de
text:
On Sat, Aug 30, 2008 at 10:30:09PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of emulators/desmume,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/126985 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I have handed maintainership of this port over to the submitter
of this PR.

Stefan
